svg.metadata: {"schema_version":1,"id":"21_left_to_right_crossroute","label":"Left-right cross route","topology":"A supported L0-to-R0 route crosses and joins the main B0-to-T0 road at one clear central four-way intersection.","sockets":["B0","T0","L0","R0"],"socket_contract":{"B0":{"edge":"bottom","center":0.5,"direction":"vertical","road_width":0.16},"T0":{"edge":"top","center":0.5,"direction":"vertical","road_width":0.035},"L0":{"edge":"left","center":0.56,"direction":"horizontal","road_width":0.028},"R0":{"edge":"right","center":0.56,"direction":"horizontal","road_width":0.028}}}
